generated_exposure.exposure_text: Remember when we had to wait hours for help after the last big storm? That's why we need stronger domestic security powers. Our neighbors in the Midwest have been using these tools for years, and their response times are now half what ours were. It's time we catch up and protect our own communities better. #SafetyFirst #CommunityFirst
